# Bankruptcy Means Test Online - Free Calculator & Guide [2026]
> Last updated: 2026-05-01

> Free bankruptcy means test calculator. Enter your income and expenses to check Chapter 7 eligibility instantly. Updated with 2026 median inco...

## About
meanstest.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Above Median Income? You May Still Qualify for Chapter 7 - Means Test: https://meanstest.org/above-median-income.html
- Self-Employed Means Test - Business Expenses and Chapter 7 Eligibility: https://meanstest.org/business-income.html
- Free Means Test Calculator - Check If You Pass the Bankruptcy Means Test: https://meanstest.org/calculator.html
- The Chapter 13 Means Test - Plan Length, Not Eligibility: https://meanstest.org/chapter-13-means-test.html
- Common Means Test Mistakes - Errors That Can Cost You: https://meanstest.org/common-mistakes.html
- Means Test Deductions Explained - IRS Standards, Actual Expenses, and What Counts: https://meanstest.org/deductions.html
- Means Test Household Size - Who Counts?: https://meanstest.org/household-size.html
- How the Means Test Works - The Two-Step Process: https://meanstest.org/how-it-works.html
- Bankruptcy Means Test Online - Free Calculator & Guide: https://meanstest.org/
- Median Income by State - Bankruptcy Means Test Income Tables: https://meanstest.org/median-income.html
- Means Test Vocabulary - Every Term Explained | meanstest.org | Free 2026 Guide: https://meanstest.org/vocabulary.html
- What Happens If You Fail the Means Test - Your Options: https://meanstest.org/what-if-you-fail.html
- Privacy Policy: https://meanstest.org/privacy.html

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
